title: Compliment Someone
description: Say something genuinely nice about another player right now. They gain 1 point if they believe you.

title: Mandatory Dance Break
description: All players must stand up and dance for 10 seconds. No exceptions. The most enthusiastic dancer gains 2 points (voted by majority).

title: Speak Only in Questions
description: Stay in play until the start of your next turn. You may only communicate in the form of questions. Violations cost 2 points.

title: Left Hand Only
description: For the rest of this round you may only use your left hand for everything. Lefties use their right hand.

title: This Card Is Actually Cursed
description: Announce 'I am cursed.' You are cursed. What that means is up for debate.

title: Invisible Card
description: Pretend to play an invisible card. Mime its effects. Other players must react as if it was real.

title: Point at the Ceiling
description: Whoever looks up loses 1 point. If no one looks up, the player who played this card loses 1 point.

title: The Meta Card
description: This card is about itself. By reading it, you have already played it. Nothing else happens.

title: High Five Tax
description: Anyone who gives a high five for the rest of the game must pay 1 point to the other person.

title: Rename a Player
description: Give any player a nickname. They must be addressed by that name for the rest of the game. Refusing costs 3 points.

title: The Prophecy
description: Announce who you think will win the game right now. If you're correct, gain 5 points at game end.

title: Time Warp
description: Undo the last card played as if it never happened. The card goes back into the hand it came from.

title: Pay to Win
description: You may spend any number of points to gain an equal number of points. This does nothing but you feel good about it.

title: Dramatic Reading
description: Read the last card played aloud in your most dramatic voice. Other players rate you out of 10. You gain points equal to the average.

title: Conspiracy Theory
description: Accuse another player of cheating. Whether or not it's true, they must defend themselves. The group votes. If guilty, they lose 3 points.

title: Borrow a Card
description: Look at another player's hand. Take one card. You must play it immediately, for better or worse.

title: The Wild Card
description: You decide what this card does. Announce its effect out loud before playing it. It does exactly what you say.

title: Rock Paper Scissors Duel
description: Challenge any player to best-of-three rock paper scissors. Winner gains 4 points.

title: The Referendum
description: Propose any rule change. All players vote. If it passes (majority), it becomes a house rule for the rest of the game.

title: Tourist Mode
description: For your next two turns, you must ask what everything means and how the game works, as if you've never played before.

title: Free Real Estate
description: Claim any card currently on the table in front of another player. It is yours now. No take-backs.

title: The Pacifist
description: No one may lose points this round. Protective aura. Very good vibes only.

title: Choose Your Destiny
description: Draw 3 cards. Keep 1. Discard the others. You live with your choices.

title: Groundhog Day
description: The last player's turn repeats exactly. Same cards, same effects. Don't think too hard about it.

title: Emotional Support Card
description: Give this card to whoever looks like they're having the least fun. They gain 3 points.

title: Forbidden Word
description: Pick a common word. No one may say it for the rest of the game. Anyone who does loses 2 points. You decide the word.

title: The Floor Vote
description: All players simultaneously point at whoever they think deserves 3 points. The player with the most votes gets 3 points.

title: Chaos Shuffle
description: All players pass their hands to the player on their left simultaneously.

title: Two Truths and a Lie (Card Edition)
description: State two true things about a card in your hand and one lie. Other players guess the lie. Each correct guesser gets 1 point.

title: The Clone
description: Copy the effect of any card that has already been played this game. If you can remember it.

title: Timeout
description: The game pauses for 2 minutes. Players may discuss strategy, complain, or simply sit in silence.

title: The Bystander
description: Skip your turn but gain 2 points for not participating. Sometimes doing nothing is the move.

title: Hot Potato
description: Pass this card to another player at any time, even out of turn, to give them a problem you don't want. They must play it on their next turn.

title: Unreliable Narrator
description: Describe the last card that was played — but get one detail wrong. If no one notices, you gain 2 points. If someone does, they gain 2 points.

title: Legacy Card
description: Write your name on this card. It is now named after you. If it is ever played again, you gain 1 point.

title: The Hype Card
description: Announce the next card you play as if it's the most amazing thing anyone has ever done. If the table agrees, gain 3 points.

title: Nap Time
description: Close your eyes for 30 seconds. You are resting. Nothing can target you during this time. Probably.

title: The Historian
description: Recite from memory every card that has been played this game. Gain 1 point per card you correctly name.

title: Mystery Box
description: Shuffle your hand face-down. Draw one card at random and play it immediately without looking at it first.

title: The Epilogue
description: If this is the last card played in the game, whoever played it wins regardless of points. If it isn't, nothing happens.
